nodes.name: Ripley's Aquarium of Canada
nodes.description: Explore one of North America's largest aquariums featuring over 20,000 marine creatures and the stunning Dangerous Lagoon underwater tunnel.
nodes.premise: POI: Ripley's Aquarium of Canada - Explore one of North America's largest aquariums featuring over 20,000 marine creatures and the stunning Dangerous Lagoon underwater tunnel.

nodes.name: CN Tower
nodes.description: Ascend to the observation deck for breathtaking 360-degree views of Toronto and Lake Ontario.
nodes.premise: POI: CN Tower - Ascend to the observation deck for breathtaking 360-degree views of Toronto and Lake Ontario.

nodes.name: Steam Whistle Brewery Tour
nodes.description: Tour a historic brewery housed in a vintage railway roundhouse and learn about craft beer making.
nodes.premise: POI: Steam Whistle Brewery Tour - Tour a historic brewery housed in a vintage railway roundhouse and learn about craft beer making.

nodes.name: Rogers Centre Stadium Tour
nodes.description: Go behind the scenes at the iconic home of the Toronto Blue Jays with its retractable roof.
nodes.premise: POI: Rogers Centre Stadium Tour - Go behind the scenes at the iconic home of the Toronto Blue Jays with its retractable roof.

nodes.name: Harbourfront Centre Evening Stroll
nodes.description: Walk along the scenic waterfront promenade enjoying sunset views over Lake Ontario.
nodes.premise: POI: Harbourfront Centre Evening Stroll - Walk along the scenic waterfront promenade enjoying sunset views over Lake Ontario.

nodes.name: TIFF Bell Lightbox Cinema
nodes.description: Catch a film screening at Toronto's premier cinema destination, home of the Toronto International Film Festival.
nodes.premise: POI: TIFF Bell Lightbox Cinema - Catch a film screening at Toronto's premier cinema destination, home of the Toronto International Film Festival.

nodes.name: Gardiner Museum of Ceramic Art
nodes.description: Canada's only museum dedicated to ceramic art featuring ancient and contemporary pottery from around the world.
nodes.premise: POI: Gardiner Museum of Ceramic Art - Canada's only museum dedicated to ceramic art featuring ancient and contemporary pottery from around the world.

nodes.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
nodes.description: World-class museum showcasing Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a stunning Frank Gehry-designed building.
nodes.premise: POI: Art Gallery of Ontario - World-class museum showcasing Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a stunning Frank Gehry-designed building.

nodes.name: Graffiti Alley (Rush Lane)
nodes.description: Wander through Toronto's most vibrant outdoor gallery, a kilometer of ever-changing street art murals.
nodes.premise: POI: Graffiti Alley (Rush Lane) - Wander through Toronto's most vibrant outdoor gallery, a kilometer of ever-changing street art murals.

nodes.name: Museum of Contemporary Art Toronto
nodes.description: Cutting-edge contemporary art space in a converted industrial building showcasing experimental works.
nodes.premise: POI: Museum of Contemporary Art Toronto - Cutting-edge contemporary art space in a converted industrial building showcasing experimental works.

nodes.name: Theatre Passe Muraille
nodes.description: Iconic experimental theatre presenting avant-garde Canadian productions in an intimate setting.
nodes.premise: POI: Theatre Passe Muraille - Iconic experimental theatre presenting avant-garde Canadian productions in an intimate setting.

nodes.name: Toronto Islands Kayaking
nodes.description: Paddle around the Toronto Islands chain with stunning skyline views and wildlife sightings.
nodes.premise: POI: Toronto Islands Kayaking - Paddle around the Toronto Islands chain with stunning skyline views and wildlife sightings.

nodes.name: Ward's Island Beach
nodes.description: Relax on Toronto's best sandy beach with views of the city skyline and calm Lake Ontario waters.
nodes.premise: POI: Ward's Island Beach - Relax on Toronto's best sandy beach with views of the city skyline and calm Lake Ontario waters.

nodes.name: Centre Island Bike Trail Loop
nodes.description: Cycle the scenic car-free trails connecting all three islands through gardens and forested paths.
nodes.premise: POI: Centre Island Bike Trail Loop - Cycle the scenic car-free trails connecting all three islands through gardens and forested paths.

nodes.name: High Park Nature Trails
nodes.description: Hike through 400 acres of forest, wetlands, and ravines in Toronto's largest urban park.
nodes.premise: POI: High Park Nature Trails - Hike through 400 acres of forest, wetlands, and ravines in Toronto's largest urban park.

nodes.name: Sunnyside Boardwalk & Beach
nodes.description: Sunset stroll along the historic boardwalk with views of Lake Ontario and the Humber Bay Arch Bridge.
nodes.premise: POI: Sunnyside Boardwalk & Beach - Sunset stroll along the historic boardwalk with views of Lake Ontario and the Humber Bay Arch Bridge.

nodes.name: Humber Bay Park Stargazing
nodes.description: End the day with stargazing at this waterfront park, one of the best spots in Toronto for night sky viewing.
nodes.premise: POI: Humber Bay Park Stargazing - End the day with stargazing at this waterfront park, one of the best spots in Toronto for night sky viewing.
